description: After this command is executed, all tetrahedral blocks subsequently created will be turned into zones and merged into a single block if they share the same group name. The group slot name can be specified with s1 . If no slot is given, the default slot is used. If blocks have not been assigned a group name in the specified slot, they will not be merged. One or more groups can be excluded from merging by using the keyword Exclude and providing group names ( s1 s2 …)
